activated_rules.rule_name: Certificate taken from certificate file; verification invoice taken from separate invoice file
Pairing validation passed via matching invoice number 4870996
General goods description with invoice reference present in certificate
Mixed origins present and origin linked per invoice item
EU member state origin equivalence active

consignor.certificate_value:
Husqvarna Construction
Jons väg 19
SE433 75, JONSERED
Sweden
consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor name "Husqvarna Construction" is explicitly identifiable as a leading substring in the invoice seller name "HUSQVARNA CONSTRUCTION PRODUCTS" on the invoice pages, satisfying the mandatory pre-check for consignor presence in invoice material. The invoice seller country is explicitly Sweden, which matches the certificate country Sweden. Street/postcode differences do not prevent match under the consignor rules.

consignee.certificate_value:
MODERN AGE CREATIVE SOULTION
415N ELGAISH ST
12522 HADABET AL-AHRAM
ARAB REPUBLIC OF EGYPT
consignee.invoice_value:
MODERN AGE CREATIVE SOULTION
415N ELGAISH ST
12522 HADABET AL-AHRAM
ARAB REPUBLIC OF EGYPT
consignee.motivation: The certificate consignee is found verbatim in the invoice primary consignee/buyer blocks. Company name, address block and country "ARAB REPUBLIC OF EGYPT" align directly, so the consignee is positively verified without interpretation.

goods_description.certificate_value:
6382714,6382719,6382721
ATTACHED INVOICE DATED ON 260203
Scarifiers, Shot Blasters
goods_description.motivation: The certificate contains explicit identifiers "6382714,6382719,6382721", and the same identifier string is found in the invoice goods specification page. The product description "Scarifiers, Shot Blasters" is also explicitly present in the invoice goods specification. In addition, the certificate explicitly references attached invoice 4870996 dated 260203, which aligns with invoice no. 4870996 dated 2026-02-03. Goods description is therefore verified under the mandatory priority path.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity field explicitly states gross weight "589 kg". The invoice explicitly states total gross weight "589,00" kg. The numeric value matches after permitted numeric format normalization, and the value clearly refers to the same shipment/invoice.

origin.invoice_value:
Country of origin
SEE BELOW
970 69 21-01 SHOT BLASTER BLASTRAC 1-8DPS55 1 PCS BG*
970 61 56-01 FLOOR SCARIFIER BMP 265 | 400 2 PCS PL*
origin.motivation: The certificate origin field states "the European Community BG PL". The invoice explicitly provides per-item origins in the origin column as "BG*" and "PL*" after the dedicated heading "Country of origin SEE BELOW". Thus each specific country named in the certificate is expressly identified in the invoice, and the "European Community" component is also satisfied because BG and PL are EU member states. No contradictory non-EU origin is shown.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: The certificate was paired with the separate invoice file in accordance with the file-pairing rule, not with the embedded invoice copy inside the certificate file. Pairing validation passed because the certificate references invoice 4870996 and the separate invoice file bears the same invoice number. Consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity and origin were all positively verified against the invoice. The invoice file is image-based, but the rendered pages were sufficiently legible to support explicit verification of all applicable control points.
